use_cases: AI chatbot message input with gradient styling for SaaS applications
Model selector dropdown for switching between AI providers like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini
File attachment support for enriching AI conversations with context
Theme-aware gradient customization for light and dark mode design systems
Animated chat input with customizable shadows and glow effects
ai_summary: A gradient-styled chat input component with built-in AI model selector dropdown, supporting file attachments and theme-aware color customization. Features animated gradient borders, customizable shadows, and multi-model switching (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) for AI-powered applications. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and next-themes for dark/light mode support.
